rag_rules: Repair missing semicolons in AGREE annex blocks to resolve syntax parsing failures.
Ensure all guarantee and assumption clauses are syntactically closed and properly terminated.
generic_rules: Fix type mismatches by aligning helper declarations with the actual scalar types (int, real, bool).
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared eq helpers in contracts; remove clauses referencing unresolved identifiers.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes require 'annex agree {** ... **};' with semicolons ending all declarations and clauses.
Logical expressions in guarantees must use AGREE operators: and, or, not(), =>; avoid external syntax.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new subcomponent paths or internal bindings in component type annexes.
Never guess or fabricate types for identifiers; delete clauses with unresolved references instead of patching architecture.
irrelevant_topics: AADL scope notes for component implementation bindings
